popularStory.headline: Guilhem VII de Montpellier
popularStory.description: Guilhem VII de Montpellier appartient à la dynastie des Guilhem, seigneurs de cette ville. Il est né vers 1130 au Château de Gallargues, vers Montpellier. Il était le fils aîné de Guilhem VI et de son …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier於1129年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也時，他的父親Guillaume de Saint-Omer45歲，母親Melisende Picquigny54歲。他和Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1172年9月29日在他的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛布易拉阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier于1129年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也时，他的父亲Guillaume de Saint-Omer45岁，母亲Melisende Picquigny54岁。他和Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。他去世于1172年9月29日在他的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛布易拉阿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier was born in 1129, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, his father, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, was 45 and his mother, Melisende Picquigny, was 54. He had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. He died on 29 September 1172, in his hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier est né en 1129, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Melisende Picquigny, avait 54 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1172, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier 1129 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Saint-Omer 45 und seine Mutter Melisende Picquigny 54. Er hatte mit Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1172 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier è nato il nel 1129 nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Melisende Picquigny, aveva 54 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. Morì il 29 settembre 1172, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllierが1129年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Saint-Omerは45歳，母Melisende Picquignyは54歳であった。彼はMathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1172年9月29日に故郷で43歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスターン-エト-ガーオンボウイラックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier(이)가 1129년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Saint-Omer(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Melisende Picquigny(은)는 54세였다. 그는 Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1172년 9월 29일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른-트-가니 부이라크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier nasceu em 1129, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Melisende Picquigny, tinha 54 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1172, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier родился в 1129 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Saint-Omer было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende Picquigny, 54. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. Он умер 29 сентября 1172 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности боуиллак, тарн-ет-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier nació en 1129, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Saint-Omer, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Melisende Picquigny, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1172, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
